LUT6.spec: UG574 LUT6 = 64-bit INIT SRAM + 6-level 2:1 mux tree

CLK_ROOT.spec: UG572 clock root (routing->distribution PIP, M:1 config-mux)

clk_pip.spec: UG572 Ch1-2 clock routing PIP - config-mux selecting a track driver (drive-rule fabric per Agent D findings).

clock_switch.spec: UG572 Fig 3-8 clock input switchover. NOTE: CLKINSEL polarity not given in UG572 p58; mux selects CLKIN1 when CLKINSEL=1, CLKIN2 when CLKINSEL=0.

div_prog_frac.spec: UG572 Fig 3-1/3-24 fractional divider, 1/8 resolution. div_prog supplies the integer-divided clock O; a 3-bit phase accumulator (acc += FRAC each O edge) exposes its carry as FRAC_CARRY at the boundary (the +1/8 step pulse). WARNING: the doc's true two-counter / two-VCO-phase topology is NOT reproduced; this is the N/N+1 accumulator realization.

MMCME4_ADV.spec: MMCME4_ADV (35-port): clock_switch + MMCME4_BASE + DRP + phase_shift + CDDC handshake.

phase_shift.spec: UG572 p43 dynamic phase shift. Models the PSEN->PSDONE handshake only. WARNING: the VCO 8-phase select mux and the full 12-cycle / 1-56 phase accumulator are simplified out; this is the rising-edge-detect + fixed-latency DONE pulse controller.

PLLE4_ADV.spec: UG572 Table 3-10: PLLE4_ADV = PLLE4_BASE + DRP only.

ssc_modulator.spec: UG572 p63-71 spread spectrum clocking. ABSTRACT stub: ports only, decomposition pending. WARNING: triangular-ramp M-perturbation; the exact step / period / SS registers are NOT specified in UG572 (they live in XAPP888). Do not synthesize until the step math is sourced.

clock_tree_mmcm._note: Abstract block — route.py decomposes into MMCME4 + BUFGCE instances

clock_mux_bufgctrl.description: Glitch-free clock mux using BUFGCTRL (dual-input selector)
clock_mux_bufgctrl._note: Abstract block — route.py decomposes into BUFGCTRL instance
